title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter, discusses predictions for pending IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The conversation covers IPO sequencing strategy, how each company differs, and the capital dynamics for AI infrastructure companies in the public markets.
